use_cases: Displaying user location within a website hierarchy for easy navigation
E-commerce category and product page navigation paths
Admin dashboard and settings page breadcrumb trails
Document or knowledge base hierarchical navigation
Multi-step form or wizard progress indication
ai_summary: A composite breadcrumb navigation component built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS, providing accessible hierarchical navigation with customizable sub-components for links, separators, and current page indicators. Follows shadcn/ui design patterns with minimal visual styling and standard hover interactions.
